final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing editorial photo of an industrial-style café interior with exposed concrete and vintage leather seating.

Style/medium: industrial interior photography, raw and refined aesthetic in the spirit of Dwell magazine editorial shoots
Composition: wide-angle establishing shot from entry level, 24mm lens, capturing the full depth of the space
Subject: vintage cognac leather Chesterfield sofas with patina, aged brass coffee tables, exposed ductwork and galvanized metal pipes overhead
Scene/backdrop: raw concrete walls with visible aggregate texture, large factory-style windows with black steel frames
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight streaming through large windows, diffused morning light, creating gentle shadows on concrete
Color palette: cool gray concrete as base, warm cognac leather as anchor, black metal fixtures as contrast, muted earth tones
Materials/textures: rough unfinished concrete, smooth aged leather with natural creases, cold metal pipe surfaces, matte black window frames
Avoid: polished marble, glossy surfaces, generic stock photo lighting, overly staged props, 8K stuffer aesthetic
